roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
DEFT'S ATC TO VACATE TRIAL DATE AND SET NEW DATE, FILED
DA'S OPP TO DEF DUNSMORE'S MOT TO SUPPRESS FILED

/TWS/CH6 ISS CPROB PROB 2 Y PJ77D/CTS 77/VF2 150/DEF TO FORFEIT THE DRUGSTHAT HAD BEEN CONFISCATED/WS/LFNEW/RX/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/IBARRA/OBEY/ACCEP/REMA/DEF:NO LONGER NEED TO REPORT TO PRETRIAL DIVERSION- DEFENDANT PLACED ON COURT PROBATION,/

/CAL MOTION TO SUPPRESS HEARING/LD 12-02-16/AMEND TO ADD COUNT ELEVEN -11350(A)HS,MISD/FAWA/IRR/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEAOF NL/DEFT ADV NL:11/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/IBARRA/VD:11-22-16 TRIAL DATE/
/GTW/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, DEFENDANT IS TO ENROLL IN MENTAL HEALTH AND SUBSTANCE ABUSE COUNSELING, TO BE MONITORED THROUGH PTD,/X: CASE PRETRIED AND TRIAL DATE CONFIRMED/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/CON:CHRISTOPHER DOVE/FAW/DEFTARR/NTW/X:DEFENSE RESERVE TO THE THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/ /LDTR:12-02-16/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE AND TRIAL AND TO SET MOTION TO SUPPRESS/DOP/TE:1 WEEK

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WITEXCL:DEFENSE/INVOFF:SFPD OFFICER MICHAEL BUSHNELL/WIT SWORN DA: SFPD OFFICER DANNY LI/WIT SWORN DA: SFPD OFFICER MICHAEL BUSHNELL/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1, COLOR PHOTO OF ITEMS SEIZED; PEOPLE'S 2, PHOTO OF  CREDIT CARDS SEIZED; PEOPLE'S 3, PHOTO OF ITEMS SEIZED FROM TRUNK OFSILVER BMW; PEOPLE'S 4, ADDITONAL PHOTO VIEW OF ITEMS SEIZED FROM TRUNK OFBMW; PEOPLE'S 5, PHOTO OF DELTA SKYMILES CARD; PEOPLE'S 6, PHOTO OF BMW LICENSE PLATE; PEOPLE'S 7, EVIDENCE ENVELOPE MARKED NUMBER 1; PEOPLE'S 7A, PLASTIC ENVELOPE CONTAINING 2 BAGGIES IN IT;  PEOPLE'S 8, EVIDENCE ENVELOPE MARKED NUMBER 2; PEOPLE'S 8A, BAGGIE CONTAINING BLACK TAR-LIKE SUBSTANCE IDENTIFIED AS HEROINE; PEOPLE'S 9, EVIDENCE ENVELOPE MARK NUMBER 4; PEOPLE'S 9A, PLASTIC ENVELOPE CONTAINING METHAMPHETAMINE; PEOPLE'S 10, ALAMEDA COUNTYCRIMINOLOGIST EXAMINATION REPORT; PEOPLE'S 11, CERTIFIED COPY OF DEFENDANTDUNSMORE'S CII RAP SHEET/HTA1:1, 2, & 9/871D:10/X:COUNTS 11 & 12 ARE CERTIFIED,/X:THE COURT FINDS THE ALLEGATION APPENDED TO COUNT 1 TO BE TRUE,//X:THE COURT FINDS THE ALLEGATION APPENDED TO COUNT 2 TO BE NOT TRUE,/CTORD:THAT THE WORD LAPTOP BE STRICKEN FROM THE LANGUAGE IN COUNT 9,/EXHRET/BAIL:50,000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT ON 10-03-16 IN DEPTARTMENT 22 AT 9:00 AM,/DOP/
